rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. KENNETT TAYLOR et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 11, 2013, line 5 - DEFENDANT KENNETT TAYLOR and JAY ROBINSON's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. rulings.Case Title: ESCALADE CAPITAL GROUP, LLC et al VS. RYAN BENTHEM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 11, 2013, line 6 - DEFENDANT RYAN BENTHAM's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND. Deny - Fails to meet CCP 1008 new facts and new lease; Facts and lease presented existed at time of original motion; Also defendant's declaration not competent evidence. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ERIC LEE VS. MS. FU YUN FENG et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 11, 2013, line 7 - DEFENDANT YUN FU FENG's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend notice fatally defective on numerous grounds including - No advice re Rent Board, inconsistent 3 days and 10 days notice; Late fee request, etc. =(501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AMISH PATEL VS. MOHAMMED RIBBI AYESH et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, January 11, 2013, line 8 - DEFENDANT MOHAMMED AYESH's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule, 5 days to answer defendant fails to state authority re demurrer proper means to compel arbitration and tax being rent within meaning of CCP 1161(2) = (501/REQ)
